prestazioni: Upgrade to a **McLaren M840T 4.0L V8 twin-turbo** (engine code: M840T) with a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (76mm compressor, 84mm turbine) paired with a **Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate** for precise boost control, targeting 2.2 bar (32 psi) peak pressure with a custom **Motec M150 ECU** reflash for optimized fuel and ignition maps (1,200+ hp potential on E85).

Install a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU** with **McLaren-specific CAN bus integration** for real-time telemetry and adaptive traction control, paired with a **Nitrous Express GenX Direct Port 400HP kit** (dual-stage, progressive controller) for on-demand power spikes in track mode.

Replace the OEM **McLaren 7-speed SSG dual-clutch transmission** with a **Xtrac P1227 7-speed sequential gearbox** (dog-ring engagement, paddle-shift optimized) and a **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch** (rated for 1,500 Nm torque) with a **Penske 8760 adjustable LSD** (1.5-way, 45% lock under power).
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS McLaren 750S widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders, custom front splitter with integrated **AEM CD-7 dash** for real-time aero data) paired with a **Vorsteiner V-RT carbon fiber rear diffuser** (3-piece, active Gurney flap).

Install **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 20x10.5 ET45 (front) and 21x12.5 ET50 (rear)** wheels with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear)** and **AP Racing CP9460-1000 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** with **Brembo HTC64T 410mm carbon-ceramic rotors**.

Apply a **3M Matte Graphite Wrap (2080 series)** with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** accents (gloss black mirror caps, satin gold brake caliper covers) and **Lumileds Luxeon Z ES LED headlights** (custom DRLs, adaptive beam pattern) paired with a **Rear Carbon Fiber Engine Cover (McLaren MSO option)**.
